meaning: adj.鏈紑鍖栫殑,涓嶆枃鏄庣殑,鏃犳枃鍖栫殑
examples: I think any sport involving harm to animals is barbaric and uncivilized.
I have worked in the wildest and most uncivilized parts of the world.
It takes the most cool-headed and good-tempered of drivers to resist the temptation to revenge when subjected to uncivilized behavior.
People go to the stadium to watch the two teams but there's always these uncivilized people.
World history demonstrates that the more uncivilized societies become, the more they depend upon governments to regulate behavior.
